name: Debbie's Peach Barbecue Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a large saucepan.
2. Heat to low boil and stir occasionally.
3. Continue simmering for 30 minutes, stirring frequently.
4. If the sauce is too thin at the end of cooking time, add more water or cornstarch mixture until it reaches the consistency of commercial barbecue sauce.
